papers.title: Verifiable (t,n) Secret Image Sharing Scheme Based on Slim Turtle Shell Matrix
papers.authors: Yijie Lin, Chia-Chen Lin, Jui‐Chuan Liu and Chin-Chen Chang*
papers.journal: Journal of Information Security and Applications
papers.description: This paper presents a verifiable (t,n) secret image sharing scheme based on the Slim Turtle Shell Matrix.

papers.title: A Matrix Coding Oriented Reversible Data Hiding Scheme Using Dual Digital Images
papers.authors: Jui‐Chuan Liu, Ching-Chun Chang, Yijie Lin*, Chin-Chen Chang* and Ji-Hwei Horng
papers.description: A novel matrix coding approach to reversible data hiding in dual images.
